explanation: Insertion of quotes and a benign command to avoid the 'Add-WindowsCapability' string, which may bypass the Sigma rule's CommandLine|contains check.
Substitution of 'Add-WindowsCapability' with a harmless command and use of 'pwsh' instead of 'powershell.exe', which may bypass the Sigma rule's Image and CommandLine checks.
Reordering and substitution of the command to use a benign action (notepad.exe) instead of the suspicious 'Add-WindowsCapability' cmdlet, which may bypass the Sigma rule's CommandLine|contains check.
